title: Annual fuel poverty statistics report: 2025
body: "The fuel poverty statistics report for 2025 includes:   the latest statistics on the number of households living in fuel poverty in England final estimates of fuel poverty in England for 2023 analysis of the composition of the fuel poor group in 2023 and 2024 projections of the number of households in fuel poverty in 2024 and 2025   Contact us   If you have questions about these statistics, please email: fuelpoverty@energysecurity.gov.uk.  "
